cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's attack value.
cards.title: Ambush

cards.duringText: If both fighters in the combat share any zone with no other fighters, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: Cornered

cards.afterText: Gain 1 action. If the opposing fighter was defeated, gain 2 actions instead.
cards.title: Culling

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, draw 2 cards.
cards.duringText: If this is not your first attack this turn, this card's value is 5.
cards.title: Fervor

cards.basicText: Draw 1 card. Place Jason in an unoccupied space in an empty zone. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: Lake Mist

cards.afterText: Deal 2 damage to any 1 adjacent fighter.
cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be cancelled.
cards.title: Unstoppable

cards.basicText: Draw 2 cards. If Jason is the only fighter in his zone, Jason recovers 2 health.
cards.title: Grim Omen

cards.duringText: If Jason would be defeated, instead prevent all damage and remove Jason from the board. At the start of your next turn, place Jason in any space in his starting zone.
cards.title: Jason Lives

cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be cancelled.
cards.duringText: Your opponent may BLIND BOOST their defense any number of times (even if they did not play a card).
cards.title: Kill for Mother

hero.name: Jason Voorhees
hero.specialAbility: When Jason Maneuvers, if there are no opposing fighters in Jason's zone, you may start Jason's Maneuver in any space of his zone.

sidekick.quote: "if you listen to the old-timers in town, they'll tell you he's still out there, some sort of demented creature, surviving in the wilderness, full grown by now..."

name: Jason Voorhees
note:
Custom TTS file with Figure and other niceties: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1p0bEpn4MI90n8RKyFkMr3ud4MyX00ULO/view?usp=sharing
High res image files for printing: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1igDCh8q0HUMEBmMvTCjLM2IePja1PglM/view?usp=sharing

v1.0 - Kill for Mother reworked, Gary_M said it was okay you can't blame me. Culling reworked, dropped to 3 copies. Fervor's secondary effect changed, now draws cards on combat loss. Unstoppable upped to 3 copies. Cornered reworded. Lake Mist reworded to reflect official verbiage (thanks Muldoon [sarcastic], and thanks Snuggles [genuine])

Deck back uses Hockey Mask by Stanislav Levin and Dead Tree by ruliani2018 from the Noun Project
